ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment used in the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "config_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the configuration file used for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "paper_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the research paper or documentation */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the environment */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Name of the creator or source of the environment */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the environment was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., Lead Researcher, Research Assistant) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the researcher joined the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number of the training */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value at the epoch */,
  "returns" REAL /* Return value at the epoch */,
  "fireworks" REAL /* Fireworks value at the epoch */,
  "scores" INTEGER /* Score value at the epoch */,
  "lives" INTEGER /* Number of lives remaining at the epoch */,
  "epi_length" REAL /* Episode length at the epoch */,
  "num_epis" REAL /* Number of episodes at the epoch */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used at the epoch */,
  "illegal_moves" REAL /* Number of illegal moves at the epoch */,
  "epsilon" REAL /* Epsilon value at the epoch */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy value at the epoch */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric entry */,
  "training_steps" INTEGER /* Number of training steps completed */,
  "episode_reward_max" REAL /* Maximum reward in the episode */,
  "episode_reward_min" REAL /* Minimum reward in the episode */,
  "episode_reward_mean" REAL /* Mean reward in the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_probabilities" (
  "prob_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action probability entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric entry the probabilities belong to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number of the training */,
  "action_prob" TEXT /* Average action probabilities for each action at the epoch */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action probability entry */,
  "num_actions" INTEGER /* Number of possible actions in the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prob_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_probabilities_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES experiment_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the hyperparameters belong to */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in the training */,
  "discount_factor" REAL /* Discount factor used in the training */,
  "exploration_rate" REAL /* Exploration rate (epsilon) used in the training */,
  "hidden_layers" TEXT /* Structure of hidden layers in the neural network */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in the training */,
  "buffer_size" INTEGER /* Size of the replay buffer */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the hyperparameter entry */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used in the training */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used in the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the episode */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the episode */,
  "total_reward" REAL /* Total reward accumulated in the episode */,
  "num_steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken in the episode */,
  "illegal_moves" INTEGER /* Number of illegal moves in the episode */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the episode */,
  "episode_reward_max" REAL /* Maximum reward in the episode */,
  "episode_reward_min" REAL /* Minimum reward in the episode */,
  "episode_reward_mean" REAL /* Mean reward in the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the step belongs to */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number within the episode */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken at the step */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward received at the step */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the environment at the step */,
  "next_state" TEXT /* Next state of the environment after the action */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the step */,
  "is_terminal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the step is terminal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_steps_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., laptop, desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, guest) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the tag was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
